name: Claude API
description: Developer-facing Claude Platform releases verified against official Claude Platform release notes.
headline: Verified Claude API releases across {days} days.
subtitle: October 17, 2025 — April 23, 2026. Claude Platform release notes only.
footnote: Dates and links cross-checked on April 24, 2026 against official Claude Platform release notes and API documentation.

releases.title: Messages API idempotency keys
releases.description: Messages API added idempotency key support to safely retry requests without duplicate completions in flaky network conditions.

releases.title: Usage and cost export endpoints
releases.description: New billing export endpoints enabled per-workspace usage CSV/JSON downloads and granular attribution by key, model, and project.

releases.title: Prompt caching analytics
releases.description: Prompt caching metrics became visible in API responses and dashboard analytics, including hit rate, cache-token savings, and effective latency deltas.

releases.title: Structured outputs GA
releases.whatChanged: API responses can follow a JSON schema you provide, with validation enforced server-side.
releases.description: Structured JSON outputs and strict tool-use schema validation became generally available on the Claude API.

prerequisites: JSON Schema for your output shape
steps: Define the `output_format` (or equivalent) with your JSON Schema in the request.
Send the user/tool messages as usual; parse the model output as validated JSON.
Handle schema errors from the API like other request validation failures.

releases.title: Compaction API beta
releases.description: Anthropic launched server-side compaction for managing long-running conversations, activated with the `compact-2026-01-12` beta header.

releases.title: Data residency controls
releases.description: Developers gained control over where supported model inference runs via the `inference_geo` parameter (`"us"` or `"global"`).

releases.title: Adaptive thinking
releases.description: New `thinking: {type: "adaptive"}` mode lets Claude dynamically decide when and how much to think based on task complexity. Recommended mode for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6.

releases.title: Web search tool GA
releases.description: The web search tool graduated from beta and no longer required a beta header. Web search and web fetch gained dynamic filtering to reduce token cost.

releases.title: Programmatic tool calling GA
releases.description: Claude gained first-class support for code that can invoke tools programmatically inside tool-enabled flows.

releases.title: Automatic prompt caching for the Messages API
releases.description: Messages API caching gained automatic cache point movement as conversations grow — no manual cache-break management needed.

releases.title: 1M token context window GA for Claude 4.6
releases.description: Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 gained a generally available 1M token context window.

releases.title: Thinking display control
releases.description: Extended thinking added the `display` field for summarized or omitted thinking output.

releases.title: Fine-grained tool streaming GA
releases.description: Streams tool-use parameter values without buffering or JSON validation, reducing latency for large parameters. No beta header required on any model.

releases.title: Models API capability fields
releases.description: Models API responses started exposing capability metadata and token limits directly, removing the need to hardcode per-model limits.

releases.title: Message Batches max_tokens raised to 300k
releases.description: The Message Batches API raised its `max_tokens` cap for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6.

releases.title: Advisor tool public beta
releases.description: Pair a fast executor model with a high-intelligence advisor model for strategic mid-generation guidance on long-horizon agentic workloads. Requires `advisor-tool-2026-03-01` beta header.

releases.title: Claude Managed Agents public beta
releases.description: Managed Agents launched in public beta providing secure sandboxed execution, long-running sessions, scoped permissions, and end-to-end tracing at $0.08/runtime hour. All endpoints require the managed-agents-2026-04-01 beta header.

releases.title: ant CLI for the Claude API
releases.description: Anthropic shipped the ant CLI — a command-line client for the Claude API with native Claude Code integration and YAML-based versioning of API resources.

releases.title: Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 deprecation announced
releases.description: Anthropic announced the deprecation of claude-sonnet-4-20250514 and claude-opus-4-20250514, with retirement on the Claude API scheduled for June 15, 2026. Recommended migrations are Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.7 respectively.

releases.title: Claude Opus 4.7 available on the Claude API
releases.description: Opus 4.7 is available as claude-opus-4-7 at the same $5/$25 per MTok pricing as Opus 4.6, with API breaking changes versus Opus 4.6 (see the migration guide before upgrading) and an updated tokenizer that may map inputs to roughly 1.0–1.35× more tokens.

releases.title: Claude Haiku 3 retired on the Claude API
releases.description: claude-3-haiku-20240307 is now retired on the Claude API and returns errors. Migrate to Claude Haiku 4.5 for a near-frontier, lower-cost replacement; the deprecation was pre-announced on February 19, 2026.

releases.title: Memory for Claude Managed Agents enters public beta
releases.description: Claude Managed Agents now support persistent memory across sessions in public beta under the standard managed-agents-2026-04-01 beta header, with a documented integration guide at /docs/en/managed-agents/memory.

releases.title: Claude API webhooks GA
releases.description: Claude Platform promoted event webhooks to general availability with signed delivery, replay protection, and retry tooling.
